_comment: Tier-2 for kratos poisson#: confirms the ConvectionDiffusionApplication element-naming claims. LaplacianElement2D3N/3D4N + EulerianConvDiff2D3N/3D4N are valid Kratos element names accessible ONLY through the string-typed factory model_part.CreateNewElement(name, id, nodes, props) — they are NOT Python attributes on the CDA module. Wrong name 'ConvDiff2D3N' (no Eulerian prefix) is rejected with 'is not registered'. Discovered during this audit that KratosConvectionDiffusionApplication was missing from the .venv; installed via pip during probe. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (Kratos 10.4.2).
